prerequisites: A CoinMarketCap Developer Portal account at pro.coinmarketcap.com. The free Basic plan is sufficient to obtain a key.
A CoinMarketCap API key copied from the Developer Portal dashboard, to supply as the api_key field.
A value for the required data_type field selecting which CoinMarketCap dataset the connector reads.
Optionally, the cryptocurrency symbols to filter to, supplied via the optional symbols field.

authMethods.name: API Key
authMethods.summary: CoinMarketCap authenticates every request with an API key sent in the X-CMC_PRO_API_KEY HTTP header. The connector maps this to its single secret field, api_key. Generate the key from your account dashboard in the CoinMarketCap Developer Portal at pro.coinmarketcap.com.

setupSteps.title: Create a Developer Portal account
setupSteps.body: Sign up at pro.coinmarketcap.com/signup. The free Basic plan requires no subscription.

setupSteps.title: Get your API key
setupSteps.body: Sign in to the Developer Portal and copy your API key from the account dashboard. This is the key CoinMarketCap expects in the X-CMC_PRO_API_KEY request header.

setupSteps.title: Configure the connector credential
setupSteps.body: Paste the key into the connector's api_key field. This required secret field is what the connector uses to authenticate against the CoinMarketCap API.

setupSteps.title: Select the data type
setupSteps.body: Set the required data_type field to choose which CoinMarketCap dataset to extract.

setupSteps.title: Optionally restrict by symbols
setupSteps.body: If you only need specific cryptocurrencies, set the optional symbols field to the symbols you want. Leave it empty to use the data_type default scope.

sources.title: CoinMarketCap API Get Started / Quick Start guide
